title: PaginationEnvelope
description: Cursor-based pagination envelope for list endpoints. Use starting_after with the last item's id to fetch the next page.

data.description: The list of items on this page.

has_more.description: True if there are more items beyond this page.

next_cursor.description: Cursor value for the next page. Pass as starting_after on the next request. Null if has_more is false.

total_count.description: Total number of items matching the query, if available. May be null for large result sets.
